support.title: Support BA Torment
support.line.serverCost: Server costs are covered by Austin and 100% voluntary donations.
support.line.openChat: Please use OpenKakaoTalk only for gifticon donations.
apiKey.title: Enter Gemini API Key
apiKey.desc.line1: Chatting with ARONA requires a Google Gemini API key.
apiKey.desc.line2: The key is not stored on the server and is kept for 10 minutes (auto-extended while chatting).
apiKey.label: API Key
apiKey.invalid: That doesn't look like a valid Gemini API key.
apiKey.studio: Get a free API key from Google AI Studio
apiKey.notice.title: Heads up
apiKey.notice.beta: ARONA is in beta and may not work correctly.
apiKey.notice.feedback: Your questions and the answers may be used to improve the feature.
apiKey.search.title: 🔍 About search
apiKey.search.line1: Free API keys have limited search, so some answers may be inaccurate.
apiKey.search.line2: Adding a billing method to your project enables search but charges your card per use.
